hk.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

	可自由選擇中英對照, 繁體中文或英文聖經閱讀.


請參考在PalReader 網站上的使用錄像來深入了解此應用程序.
閱讀程序具有以下先進功能:

專為iPhone 而做的存儲優化, 存儲相同的圖書比其它程序節省超過30%的空間.
全屏幕閱讀支持. LoudReader 只在用戶需要時顯示控制對話框, 而其它iPhone 閱讀程序顯示控制始終佔用寶貴的屏幕.
支持任意方向閱讀. 程序自動調整圖書顯示方式.
使用HTML顯示圖書的多種字體與圖像, 優於其它程序的單一字體文本顯示方式.
頁內捲動控制幫助讀者在長頁面內快速移動到任意位置.
直觀調整字體大小,顏色以及背景.
手指雙擊擊即可使用的章節選擇, 字體大小控制.
歷史記憶功能幫助用戶快速到任意章節或前後章節
準確回到上次閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置)

操作簡介

每一章為一長頁, 用手指拖動卷滾或輕擊頁面上部1/4或下部1/4進行向上或向下翻頁.
雙擊頁面即可彈出控制面板. 閱讀器的操作由這一個彈出式控制面板控制, 簡單直觀方便易用.
如希望快速在頁面內移動, 可用控制面板小滾輪選擇頁面位置百分比.
輕擊綠色的箭頭控制章節導航的後退和前進.
退出閱讀器時程序會自動記住最後的閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置), 下次進入閱讀器時程序直接打開到此處.

hk.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

# Support & Legal #
For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:

Privacy Policy:

End User License Agreement (EULA):

hk.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

hk.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

Important note

AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output.

© 2025 FlowDown Team. All rights reserved.

hk.description:
種植作物，壯大你的農業王國！扮演現代農夫，操作 Case IH、CLAAS、DEUTZ-FAHR、Fendt、John Deere、KRONE、Massey Ferguson、New Holland、Valtra 和許多其他全世界知名製造商的超過 100 種真實機具，進行各式各樣的農業活動。

在 Farming Simulator 23 (FS23) 中選擇自己想成為哪種農夫，這款由 GIANTS Software 開發，廣受好評的農業模擬遊戲現於行動裝置推出，提供全新體驗和許多新功能！

操作真實的牽引機、收割機、農田噴霧機等機具
在農田上種植各種作物，也可以在山坡上種植葡萄和橄欖
操作林業重機具開始伐木工作
建立生產鏈並使用馬力強大的卡車運輸
照顧牛、羊等農場牲畜，現在還有雞！
在兩張新地圖上歡享數不清的可能性，包括收藏品
新遊戲功能也包括犁田和除草
教學模式、AI 助手和新的木頭 / 托盤自動裝載功能，協助你進行農場工作

犁田、除草、收割作物，或是從雞舍拾取雞蛋後，還有許多工作要做：把你的收成製作成有價值的貨物，利用新的工廠和生產鏈讓你的生意蒸蒸日上！

別擔心，你會有時間在廣大的耕地上悠閒散步，不同的季節也會有不同的圖像氛圍。如果超過 100 種機具還不夠，你現在能透過可下載內容擴大農業機具陣容。

如果你是鄉村生活的新手，全新的改良遊戲內教學會教你如何耕作。在中意的地方開始農作，好好享受美好時光！

Farming Simulator 23 將於 2023 年 5 月 23 日推出，它是這款成功模擬遊戲系列在行動裝置推出的最新官方作品。

hk.description:
您想製作屬於自己的微電影嗎？
您想當導演、製片、主演……嗎？

在電影精靈中，這些角色可以全部由您一個人搞定！

通過電影精靈，您可以把各種媒體素材如視頻、照片、音樂、文字、錄音以及手指塗鴉等，按照您的創意，把它們編輯組合在一起，並給它們添加各種特效（場景切換特效、文字動畫、濾鏡特效、片頭、蒙版等），創作出屬於您自己的微電影。

主要功能：

-可裁剪、分割、合併、縮放各種媒體素材
-疊加多層視頻（畫中畫效果），視頻數量沒有限制
-添加各種蒙版（線性蒙版、矩形蒙版、圓形蒙版、文字蒙版和路徑蒙版）來隱藏或者顯示影片的各個部分
-可摳圖（鋼筆工具、套索工具、塗抹工具和文字工具等自定義形狀摳圖工具）
-快進、倒播視頻，給視頻添加慢動作鏡頭（1/12慢速至16倍速）
- 360度旋轉影片
-多種混合影像模式
-各種字體、文字模版、文字顏色、表情符號、陰影、文字描邊等
-內寘多種風格的免費配樂和音效，可添加電腦上的音樂或者iTunes裏的音樂，還可選取匯出視頻裏的音訊
-給視頻配音錄音
-直接在影片上用手指繪畫塗鴉
-專業視頻比例，可縮放的時間線，無限制的軌道圖層
-簡單自動跟蹤功能
-添加移動式馬賽克
-自定義影片背景顏色
-可調整素材亮度、對比度、飽和度
-創建自己的Gif動畫
-私人定制特效片頭（需另外購買）
-多達幾十種濾鏡特效（素描、漫畫、魚眼、放大鏡、顏色濾鏡等）
-多達幾十種場景切換特效
-可給視頻／照片設定各種外觀如圓形、心形和鑽石等，甚至自定義獨一無二的形狀
-可設定疊加視頻／照片的透明色（Chroma Key），比如去除照片中純色背景色（綠幕藍幕摳像）
-能把視頻／照片變黑白，把需要突出的部分還原色彩突出出來（Color Splash）
-能自由變形視頻／照片成不規則形狀
-給視頻／照片／文字添加運動點，使它們動起來，縮放、旋轉和移動結合起來可創建出各種各樣的絢麗效果
-實时預覽，高分辨視頻輸出
-可通過Wi-Fi直接從電腦導入多媒體素材：視頻、照片、音樂和Gif動畫等
-可直接保存並分享影片到社交網絡，如雲盤、微信、QQ、抖音等

如果您有任何問題或迴響，請直接發郵件到verytools2006@gmail.com，我們會儘快答覆您。謝謝！

hk.description:
《Way of the Hunter》將推出手機端系列首作，太平洋西北地區的壯美景觀隨之鋪陳眼前。

在美國內茲珀斯谷的廣闊開放世界中，體驗最真實的狩獵與探索。在风景如画的自然栖息地中发现栩栩如生的动物，使用各种细节逼真的武器。

《獵人征途》的野生動物外型真實而美麗，且具備符合現實的動物群體行為特徵，提供玩家全面且真實的狩獵體驗，讓人能完全沉浸在遊戲世界。親眼目睹複雜多樣的生態環境產生的變化，周遭環境會因為你的行動而出現變動及反應。瞭解真正的獵人所代表的意義，並充分運用自己的技能來戰勝考驗。

面對人道狩獵的挑戰、搭配引人入勝的故事情節進行遊戲，或是單純地在這富饒的自然環境中自由狩獵。

* 數十種細節精緻的動物物種與真實的行為模式，為你帶來真正身歷其境的狩獵體驗
* 醒目標示動物跡象、血跡分析，以及能夠倒回觀看子彈鏡頭的射擊回顧畫面，這些功能都能讓您像專業獵人一樣狩獵
* 使用獵人感官將重要詳情和資訊醒目標示出來，或者關閉獵人感官，讓遊戲體驗更具挑戰性
* 複雜的戰利品系統，其會根據身體素質與年齡等多項因素產生獨一無二的鹿角和動物頭角
* 細膩又自然的動物動作，以及動物察覺到玩家存在時的真實反應
* 24 小時的日夜循環，再加上風和天氣的變化
* 真實彈道與子彈物理模擬
* 大量槍枝和裝備選擇，其中包含證照管制裝備，例如：Bushnell、Federal、Leupold、Primos、Remington 和 Steyr Arms
* 遊戲內的經營模式讓玩家可以獵取野味之後，將販賣肉品所得的資金用於購買新裝備、狩獵通行證以及戰利品狩獵台上的標本
* 引人入勝的故事情節，訴說著一段關於家族狩獵事業的掙扎糾葛，以及圍繞其間的競爭關係和友誼
* 直觀的相片模式，讓你可以捕捉並分享自己最愛的瞬間
* 使用手柄或觸控控制追蹤獵物
* 優化手機端操控，兼顧舒適與效率

警告：
不支援記憶體小於 4 GB 的裝置！
您需要至少 6 GB 記憶體的裝置才能使用最高圖形設定。

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

hk.description:
您是否對相同的舊小說感到厭倦？您是否對交互式故事遊戲、視覺小說、聊天類社交遊戲和獨立遊戲感興趣，但是您已經厭倦了相同的舊遊戲？如果是這樣，您應該查看《七天》，一部視覺小說、決策性的神秘遊戲。

《七天》是一部了不起的神秘視覺小說故事類遊戲。這是一個獨特、決策類的講故事遊戲，而用戶可以根據自己的選擇創建自己的獨特故事。

通過聊天風格的視覺小說類游戲，我們將提供最佳的故事遊戲體驗和豐富的神秘故事情節，專門適用於移動設備。這是一款給您強烈推薦的遊戲。


■ 詳細講解遊戲
您做出的每一個選擇都會改變您的故事。
每個小小的選擇都會改變您與同志們的關係，
並在關鍵時刻改變您和同志們的命運。

您可以是反派，或一位可信賴的同志。
一切都取決於您的選擇。

■ 概要
有的死靈在死亡世界中經受了復活的考驗。
死亡使者給他們分配了一項任務，而他們必須互相攻擊或共同合作。您的角色，基雷爾也必須完成分配給她的選擇性任務。
但是她的任務需要其他人去死......

您只有七天
您會做出什麼樣的選擇？

立即體驗這個發人深省的故事。

■ 遊戲特色
- 圖形新穎的小說類藝術品，具有驚人的圖形
- 在生與死之間切換的獨特遊戲設置
- 根據您的選擇而變化的故事情節
- 各種成就和隱藏的挑戰
- 根據故事的不同情節和結局
- 具有神秘感的文字冒險
- 精彩的講故事遊戲

■ 推薦給那些誰：
- 對文字 / 互動內容感興趣，例如視覺小說、故事遊戲、聊天遊戲和社交遊戲
-對獨特的獨立遊戲充滿熱情，例如《傳說之下》
- 正在尋找帶有神秘和 / 或恐怖元素的講故事遊戲
- 正在尋找終極遊戲，因為他們厭倦了平常的故事類遊戲
- 對其他類型的冒險遊戲感興趣
- 我們還推薦《黑暗界辦公室：鬼怪遊戲》，這是我們的又一款出色的遊戲。

■ 我們保證它會很有趣。立即下載並體驗

如果您發現任何問題或有好的建議，請將它們發送至help@buffstudio.com。我們將努力製作出更好的視覺小說、故事、療愈、獨立，講故事、冒險類遊戲。

■ 我們需要您的支持，以製作更好的故事遊類戲。請將此故事遊戲推薦給您的家人和朋友。這將對我們有很大的幫助。

《身為警察》（This Is the Police）是一個策略/冒險遊戲，故事背景設定在一個螺旋式圍繞排水系統的城市。在遊戲中你將擔任堅韌不拔的警察局長傑克·博伊德的角色，你將潛入一個關於犯罪和陰謀的深刻故事。傑克會不會拿到一大筆錢安心地退休，亦或是最終會破產...還是更糟？

 - 你的任務很明確：在傑克·博伊德退休之前的180天內賺到50萬美元。怎麼賺？一切由你決定！

 - 決定，決定！《身為警察》（This Is the Police）的故事核心是一個黑暗的故事，以及你該如何破解它。無論你決定什麼，你的選擇都會影響比賽 - 以及傑克博伊德的命運。

- 《黃昏三鏢客》？弗里堡警察局局長能夠應付各種人。遊戲全看你的本事，找到壞人並決定如何處理他們。

 - 履行你的職責。作為弗里堡警察局的負責人，傑克每天都要處理各種各樣的挑戰：應對緊急情況，管理他的警員，保衛部門對抗市政廳和腐敗的市長等等。

 - 執行調查並收集針對弗里堡犯罪團伙的證據。

 - 處理城市中的競爭力量。每個人都可向你提供服務，但每一個都是有代價的。

 - 豐富而完整的配音故事：由《毀滅公爵》的配音演員Jon St. John為傑克·博伊德配音。

—遊戲介紹—

以《洛克人 X》系列為主軸，展現新世界觀「if」的《ROCKMAN X DiVE》將以離線版重新登場！
盡情體驗系列為人所知的橫向捲軸遊戲吧！

《洛克人 X》系列的遊戲資料保存於名為「深層紀錄檔」的電腦世界。
某天在深層記錄檔的世界中突然發生了原因不明的錯誤，導致「洛克人X」的遊戲資料發生異常。
操作「艾克斯」與「傑洛」等傳說中的英雄，挑戰非正規資料，修復遊戲資料吧！

■如實呈現洛克人各種動作
衝刺、跳躍、手砲、光劍——《洛克人X》的升種正宗動作將完全於遊戲重現！
另外更有本作特有的360度射擊和自動瞄準！
按鈕的大小與位置亦可按需要自行調整！

■超過100名《洛克人》歷代角色登場
收集自己喜愛的《洛克人》角色，再加以育成吧！
不論是記憶中的歷代角色，還是原創角色，都將以全新面貌登場！

mo.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

mo.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

# Support & Legal #
For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:
Customer Support:
suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com

Privacy Policy:
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy

End User License Agreement (EULA):

Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN

mo.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

Important note

AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output.

© 2025 FlowDown Team. All rights reserved.

增加新的應用程式內購買：John Deere 9000 系列 + 390 Plus。
mo.description:
種植作物，壯大你的農業王國！扮演現代農夫，操作 Case IH、CLAAS、DEUTZ-FAHR、Fendt、John Deere、KRONE、Massey Ferguson、New Holland、Valtra 和許多其他全世界知名製造商的超過 100 種真實機具，進行各式各樣的農業活動。

在 Farming Simulator 23 (FS23) 中選擇自己想成為哪種農夫，這款由 GIANTS Software 開發，廣受好評的農業模擬遊戲現於行動裝置推出，提供全新體驗和許多新功能！

操作真實的牽引機、收割機、農田噴霧機等機具
在農田上種植各種作物，也可以在山坡上種植葡萄和橄欖
操作林業重機具開始伐木工作
建立生產鏈並使用馬力強大的卡車運輸
照顧牛、羊等農場牲畜，現在還有雞！
在兩張新地圖上歡享數不清的可能性，包括收藏品
新遊戲功能也包括犁田和除草
教學模式、AI 助手和新的木頭 / 托盤自動裝載功能，協助你進行農場工作

犁田、除草、收割作物，或是從雞舍拾取雞蛋後，還有許多工作要做：把你的收成製作成有價值的貨物，利用新的工廠和生產鏈讓你的生意蒸蒸日上！

別擔心，你會有時間在廣大的耕地上悠閒散步，不同的季節也會有不同的圖像氛圍。如果超過 100 種機具還不夠，你現在能透過可下載內容擴大農業機具陣容。

如果你是鄉村生活的新手，全新的改良遊戲內教學會教你如何耕作。在中意的地方開始農作，好好享受美好時光！

Farming Simulator 23 將於 2023 年 5 月 23 日推出，它是這款成功模擬遊戲系列在行動裝置推出的最新官方作品。

mo.releaseNotes: 修复在iPhone X/12/13下，曲线变速页面显示不正常的问题。
mo.description:
您想製作屬於自己的微電影嗎？
您想當導演、製片、主演……嗎？

在電影精靈中，這些角色可以全部由您一個人搞定！

通過電影精靈，您可以把各種媒體素材如視頻、照片、音樂、文字、錄音以及手指塗鴉等，按照您的創意，把它們編輯組合在一起，並給它們添加各種特效（場景切換特效、文字動畫、濾鏡特效、片頭、蒙版等），創作出屬於您自己的微電影。

主要功能：

-可裁剪、分割、合併、縮放各種媒體素材
-疊加多層視頻（畫中畫效果），視頻數量沒有限制
-添加各種蒙版（線性蒙版、矩形蒙版、圓形蒙版、文字蒙版和路徑蒙版）來隱藏或者顯示影片的各個部分
-可摳圖（鋼筆工具、套索工具、塗抹工具和文字工具等自定義形狀摳圖工具）
-快進、倒播視頻，給視頻添加慢動作鏡頭（1/12慢速至16倍速）
- 360度旋轉影片
-多種混合影像模式
-各種字體、文字模版、文字顏色、表情符號、陰影、文字描邊等
-內寘多種風格的免費配樂和音效，可添加電腦上的音樂或者iTunes裏的音樂，還可選取匯出視頻裏的音訊
-給視頻配音錄音
-直接在影片上用手指繪畫塗鴉
-專業視頻比例，可縮放的時間線，無限制的軌道圖層
-簡單自動跟蹤功能
-添加移動式馬賽克
-自定義影片背景顏色
-可調整素材亮度、對比度、飽和度
-創建自己的Gif動畫
-私人定制特效片頭（需另外購買）
-多達幾十種濾鏡特效（素描、漫畫、魚眼、放大鏡、顏色濾鏡等）
-多達幾十種場景切換特效
-可給視頻／照片設定各種外觀如圓形、心形和鑽石等，甚至自定義獨一無二的形狀
-可設定疊加視頻／照片的透明色（Chroma Key），比如去除照片中純色背景色（綠幕藍幕摳像）
-能把視頻／照片變黑白，把需要突出的部分還原色彩突出出來（Color Splash）
-能自由變形視頻／照片成不規則形狀
-給視頻／照片／文字添加運動點，使它們動起來，縮放、旋轉和移動結合起來可創建出各種各樣的絢麗效果
-實时預覽，高分辨視頻輸出
-可通過Wi-Fi直接從電腦導入多媒體素材：視頻、照片、音樂和Gif動畫等
-可直接保存並分享影片到社交網絡，如雲盤、微信、QQ、抖音等

如果您有任何問題或迴響，請直接發郵件到verytools2006@gmail.com，我們會儘快答覆您。謝謝！

mo.releaseNotes:
- Improved memory consumption and stability by loading the menus on demand
- You can now fast travel to your car
- Added an option to deactivate the slow-motion effect while holding breath
- Fixed problems when opening photo mode in certain situations while driving
- Fixed that markers are always shown after restarting the game, even when turned off
- Fixed a problem with the reload button on tablets
- Many other fixes and improvements
mo.description:
《Way of the Hunter》將推出手機端系列首作，太平洋西北地區的壯美景觀隨之鋪陳眼前。

在美國內茲珀斯谷的廣闊開放世界中，體驗最真實的狩獵與探索。在风景如画的自然栖息地中发现栩栩如生的动物，使用各种细节逼真的武器。

《獵人征途》的野生動物外型真實而美麗，且具備符合現實的動物群體行為特徵，提供玩家全面且真實的狩獵體驗，讓人能完全沉浸在遊戲世界。親眼目睹複雜多樣的生態環境產生的變化，周遭環境會因為你的行動而出現變動及反應。瞭解真正的獵人所代表的意義，並充分運用自己的技能來戰勝考驗。

面對人道狩獵的挑戰、搭配引人入勝的故事情節進行遊戲，或是單純地在這富饒的自然環境中自由狩獵。

* 數十種細節精緻的動物物種與真實的行為模式，為你帶來真正身歷其境的狩獵體驗
* 醒目標示動物跡象、血跡分析，以及能夠倒回觀看子彈鏡頭的射擊回顧畫面，這些功能都能讓您像專業獵人一樣狩獵
* 使用獵人感官將重要詳情和資訊醒目標示出來，或者關閉獵人感官，讓遊戲體驗更具挑戰性
* 複雜的戰利品系統，其會根據身體素質與年齡等多項因素產生獨一無二的鹿角和動物頭角
* 細膩又自然的動物動作，以及動物察覺到玩家存在時的真實反應
* 24 小時的日夜循環，再加上風和天氣的變化
* 真實彈道與子彈物理模擬
* 大量槍枝和裝備選擇，其中包含證照管制裝備，例如：Bushnell、Federal、Leupold、Primos、Remington 和 Steyr Arms
* 遊戲內的經營模式讓玩家可以獵取野味之後，將販賣肉品所得的資金用於購買新裝備、狩獵通行證以及戰利品狩獵台上的標本
* 引人入勝的故事情節，訴說著一段關於家族狩獵事業的掙扎糾葛，以及圍繞其間的競爭關係和友誼
* 直觀的相片模式，讓你可以捕捉並分享自己最愛的瞬間
* 使用手柄或觸控控制追蹤獵物
* 優化手機端操控，兼顧舒適與效率

警告：
不支援記憶體小於 4 GB 的裝置！
您需要至少 6 GB 記憶體的裝置才能使用最高圖形設定。

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

mo.description:
您是否對相同的舊小說感到厭倦？您是否對交互式故事遊戲、視覺小說、聊天類社交遊戲和獨立遊戲感興趣，但是您已經厭倦了相同的舊遊戲？如果是這樣，您應該查看《七天》，一部視覺小說、決策性的神秘遊戲。

《七天》是一部了不起的神秘視覺小說故事類遊戲。這是一個獨特、決策類的講故事遊戲，而用戶可以根據自己的選擇創建自己的獨特故事。

通過聊天風格的視覺小說類游戲，我們將提供最佳的故事遊戲體驗和豐富的神秘故事情節，專門適用於移動設備。這是一款給您強烈推薦的遊戲。


■ 詳細講解遊戲
您做出的每一個選擇都會改變您的故事。
每個小小的選擇都會改變您與同志們的關係，
並在關鍵時刻改變您和同志們的命運。

您可以是反派，或一位可信賴的同志。
一切都取決於您的選擇。

■ 概要
有的死靈在死亡世界中經受了復活的考驗。
死亡使者給他們分配了一項任務，而他們必須互相攻擊或共同合作。您的角色，基雷爾也必須完成分配給她的選擇性任務。
但是她的任務需要其他人去死......

您只有七天
您會做出什麼樣的選擇？

立即體驗這個發人深省的故事。

■ 遊戲特色
- 圖形新穎的小說類藝術品，具有驚人的圖形
- 在生與死之間切換的獨特遊戲設置
- 根據您的選擇而變化的故事情節
- 各種成就和隱藏的挑戰
- 根據故事的不同情節和結局
- 具有神秘感的文字冒險
- 精彩的講故事遊戲

■ 推薦給那些誰：
- 對文字 / 互動內容感興趣，例如視覺小說、故事遊戲、聊天遊戲和社交遊戲
-對獨特的獨立遊戲充滿熱情，例如《傳說之下》
- 正在尋找帶有神秘和 / 或恐怖元素的講故事遊戲
- 正在尋找終極遊戲，因為他們厭倦了平常的故事類遊戲
- 對其他類型的冒險遊戲感興趣
- 我們還推薦《黑暗界辦公室：鬼怪遊戲》，這是我們的又一款出色的遊戲。

■ 我們保證它會很有趣。立即下載並體驗

如果您發現任何問題或有好的建議，請將它們發送至help@buffstudio.com。我們將努力製作出更好的視覺小說、故事、療愈、獨立，講故事、冒險類遊戲。

■ 我們需要您的支持，以製作更好的故事遊類戲。請將此故事遊戲推薦給您的家人和朋友。這將對我們有很大的幫助。

關於此遊戲：
《地城謎蹤》是一款考驗玩家 2D 空間邏輯和技能運用的解謎遊戲，你可以用劍打倒身旁的怪物、用弓箭攻擊遠處的敵人、用盾牌推動障礙物、甚至可以用手套拉動怪物改變他的位置。

此遊戲總共有 150 個精心設計的關卡，玩家必須要充分了解遊戲的機制才能順利過關。

而若要達成進階目標，則需要針對解法進行最佳化，有的時候甚至要拋棄原本的解法，重新以不同角度去觀察和思考才能達成。

mo.description:
《身為警察》（This Is the Police）是一個策略/冒險遊戲，故事背景設定在一個螺旋式圍繞排水系統的城市。在遊戲中你將擔任堅韌不拔的警察局長傑克·博伊德的角色，你將潛入一個關於犯罪和陰謀的深刻故事。傑克會不會拿到一大筆錢安心地退休，亦或是最終會破產...還是更糟？

 - 你的任務很明確：在傑克·博伊德退休之前的180天內賺到50萬美元。怎麼賺？一切由你決定！

 - 決定，決定！《身為警察》（This Is the Police）的故事核心是一個黑暗的故事，以及你該如何破解它。無論你決定什麼，你的選擇都會影響比賽 - 以及傑克博伊德的命運。

- 《黃昏三鏢客》？弗里堡警察局局長能夠應付各種人。遊戲全看你的本事，找到壞人並決定如何處理他們。

 - 履行你的職責。作為弗里堡警察局的負責人，傑克每天都要處理各種各樣的挑戰：應對緊急情況，管理他的警員，保衛部門對抗市政廳和腐敗的市長等等。

 - 執行調查並收集針對弗里堡犯罪團伙的證據。

 - 處理城市中的競爭力量。每個人都可向你提供服務，但每一個都是有代價的。

 - 豐富而完整的配音故事：由《毀滅公爵》的配音演員Jon St. John為傑克·博伊德配音。

—遊戲介紹—

以《洛克人 X》系列為主軸，展現新世界觀「if」的《ROCKMAN X DiVE》將以離線版重新登場！
盡情體驗系列為人所知的橫向捲軸遊戲吧！

《洛克人 X》系列的遊戲資料保存於名為「深層紀錄檔」的電腦世界。
某天在深層記錄檔的世界中突然發生了原因不明的錯誤，導致「洛克人X」的遊戲資料發生異常。
操作「艾克斯」與「傑洛」等傳說中的英雄，挑戰非正規資料，修復遊戲資料吧！

■如實呈現洛克人各種動作
衝刺、跳躍、手砲、光劍——《洛克人X》的升種正宗動作將完全於遊戲重現！
另外更有本作特有的360度射擊和自動瞄準！
按鈕的大小與位置亦可按需要自行調整！

■超過100名《洛克人》歷代角色登場
收集自己喜愛的《洛克人》角色，再加以育成吧！
不論是記憶中的歷代角色，還是原創角色，都將以全新面貌登場！

■豐富遊戲內容！多達數百個關卡和原創故事
遊玩《ROCKMAN X DiVE》的原創故事，和新的洛克人相遇吧。
關卡各個難度合計共數百個，內容豐富，在其中盡情體驗洛克人的動作吧！

■以武器、晶片和卡片強化角色
武器可以任意和所有角色搭配，再加以強化！
升星後會解放技能，可強化內容也會變多！
卡片設計以原作插圖為基礎，不論強化或收集都樂趣無窮！

—遊戲介紹—

戴上律師徽章，為蒙上冤罪的委託人伸冤吧！

tw.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

tw.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

tw.description:
《Way of the Hunter》將推出手機端系列首作，太平洋西北地區的壯美景觀隨之鋪陳眼前。

在美國內茲珀斯谷的廣闊開放世界中，體驗最真實的狩獵與探索。在风景如画的自然栖息地中发现栩栩如生的动物，使用各种细节逼真的武器。

《獵人征途》的野生動物外型真實而美麗，且具備符合現實的動物群體行為特徵，提供玩家全面且真實的狩獵體驗，讓人能完全沉浸在遊戲世界。親眼目睹複雜多樣的生態環境產生的變化，周遭環境會因為你的行動而出現變動及反應。瞭解真正的獵人所代表的意義，並充分運用自己的技能來戰勝考驗。

面對人道狩獵的挑戰、搭配引人入勝的故事情節進行遊戲，或是單純地在這富饒的自然環境中自由狩獵。

* 數十種細節精緻的動物物種與真實的行為模式，為你帶來真正身歷其境的狩獵體驗
* 醒目標示動物跡象、血跡分析，以及能夠倒回觀看子彈鏡頭的射擊回顧畫面，這些功能都能讓您像專業獵人一樣狩獵
* 使用獵人感官將重要詳情和資訊醒目標示出來，或者關閉獵人感官，讓遊戲體驗更具挑戰性
* 複雜的戰利品系統，其會根據身體素質與年齡等多項因素產生獨一無二的鹿角和動物頭角
* 細膩又自然的動物動作，以及動物察覺到玩家存在時的真實反應
* 24 小時的日夜循環，再加上風和天氣的變化
* 真實彈道與子彈物理模擬
* 大量槍枝和裝備選擇，其中包含證照管制裝備，例如：Bushnell、Federal、Leupold、Primos、Remington 和 Steyr Arms
* 遊戲內的經營模式讓玩家可以獵取野味之後，將販賣肉品所得的資金用於購買新裝備、狩獵通行證以及戰利品狩獵台上的標本
* 引人入勝的故事情節，訴說著一段關於家族狩獵事業的掙扎糾葛，以及圍繞其間的競爭關係和友誼
* 直觀的相片模式，讓你可以捕捉並分享自己最愛的瞬間
* 使用手柄或觸控控制追蹤獵物
* 優化手機端操控，兼顧舒適與效率

《七天》是一部了不起的神秘視覺小說故事類遊戲。這是一個獨特、決策類的講故事遊戲，而用戶可以根據自己的選擇創建自己的獨特故事。

通過聊天風格的視覺小說類游戲，我們將提供最佳的故事遊戲體驗和豐富的神秘故事情節，專門適用於移動設備。這是一款給您強烈推薦的遊戲。


■ 詳細講解遊戲
您做出的每一個選擇都會改變您的故事。
每個小小的選擇都會改變您與同志們的關係，
並在關鍵時刻改變您和同志們的命運。

您可以是反派，或一位可信賴的同志。
一切都取決於您的選擇。

■ 概要
有的死靈在死亡世界中經受了復活的考驗。
死亡使者給他們分配了一項任務，而他們必須互相攻擊或共同合作。您的角色，基雷爾也必須完成分配給她的選擇性任務。
但是她的任務需要其他人去死......

您只有七天
您會做出什麼樣的選擇？

立即體驗這個發人深省的故事。

■ 遊戲特色
- 圖形新穎的小說類藝術品，具有驚人的圖形
- 在生與死之間切換的獨特遊戲設置
- 根據您的選擇而變化的故事情節
- 各種成就和隱藏的挑戰

- 具有神秘感的文字冒險
- 精彩的講故事遊戲

- 我們還推薦《黑暗界辦公室：鬼怪遊戲》，這是我們的又一款出色的遊戲。

■ 我們保證它會很有趣。立即下載並體驗

如果您發現任何問題或有好的建議，請將它們發送至help@buffstudio.com。我們將努力製作出更好的視覺小說、故事、療愈、獨立，講故事、冒險類遊戲。

《身為警察》（This Is the Police）是一個策略/冒險遊戲，故事背景設定在一個螺旋式圍繞排水系統的城市。在遊戲中你將擔任堅韌不拔的警察局長傑克·博伊德的角色，你將潛入一個關於犯罪和陰謀的深刻故事。傑克會不會拿到一大筆錢安心地退休，亦或是最終會破產...還是更糟？

 - 你的任務很明確：在傑克·博伊德退休之前的180天內賺到50萬美元。怎麼賺？一切由你決定！

 - 決定，決定！《身為警察》（This Is the Police）的故事核心是一個黑暗的故事，以及你該如何破解它。無論你決定什麼，你的選擇都會影響比賽 - 以及傑克博伊德的命運。

- 《黃昏三鏢客》？弗里堡警察局局長能夠應付各種人。遊戲全看你的本事，找到壞人並決定如何處理他們。

 - 履行你的職責。作為弗里堡警察局的負責人，傑克每天都要處理各種各樣的挑戰：應對緊急情況，管理他的警員，保衛部門對抗市政廳和腐敗的市長等等。

 - 執行調查並收集針對弗里堡犯罪團伙的證據。

 - 處理城市中的競爭力量。每個人都可向你提供服務，但每一個都是有代價的。

 - 豐富而完整的配音故事：由《毀滅公爵》的配音演員Jon St. John為傑克·博伊德配音。

us.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

Important note

AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output.

© 2025 FlowDown Team. All rights reserved.

us.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

us.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

Dive into a deep story of corruption, crime and intrigue. Take the role of gritty Police Chief Jack Boyd, and come face to face with the ugly underbelly of Freeburg, a city spiraling the drain. Will Jack reach his retirement with a nice stack of bills, or will he end up broken ... or worse? 

Manage your staff, respond to emergencies, and investigate crimes in a city on the brink of chaos. The mafia underworld maneuvers behind the scenes, sinking their claws ever deeper into the city, even as the mayor is ready to exploit every situation to his political advantage. 

Choose your approach to each situation as it unfolds. Sometimes you’ll be responding to a developing crisis at a crime scene, or negotiating with Freeburg’s crime bosses. Sometimes you’ll find yourself dodging questions in the press room, or even the occasional cross-examination in the witness box. Can you keep this pressure cooker from exploding, at least for long enough to stash away a nice retirement nest egg?

- Your mission is clear: make $500,000 in 180 days before Jack Boyd reaches retirement. How? That’s up to you!

- Decisions, decisions! This Is the Police is all about a dark story and how you react to it. Whatever you decide, your choices will influence the game – and the fate of Jack Boyd.

- The Good, the Bad, and... the Ugly? The Chief of Freeburg's Police Department deals with all kind of people. It is up to you to find the bad guys and decide how to deal with them.

- Carry out your duties. As head of Freeburg PD, Jack deals with all sorts of challenges every day: responding to emergencies, managing his officers, defending the department against City Hall and a corrupt mayor, and much more.

- Solve Investigations and gather evidence against the criminal gangs of Freeburg.

- Deal with the competing powers of the city. Everyone offers you favors, and each one comes at a price.
Rich and fully voiced story: Jack Boyd is portrayed by Jon St. John, the voice of Duke Nukem.

tr.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING

CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer

FIRST RESPONDER MODE

tr.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

Important note

AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output.

© 2025 FlowDown Team. All rights reserved.

tr.description:
Dive into a deep story of corruption, crime and intrigue. Take the role of gritty Police Chief Jack Boyd, and come face to face with the ugly underbelly of Freeburg, a city spiraling the drain. Will Jack reach his retirement with a nice stack of bills, or will he end up broken ... or worse? 

Manage your staff, respond to emergencies, and investigate crimes in a city on the brink of chaos. The mafia underworld maneuvers behind the scenes, sinking their claws ever deeper into the city, even as the mayor is ready to exploit every situation to his political advantage. 

Choose your approach to each situation as it unfolds. Sometimes you’ll be responding to a developing crisis at a crime scene, or negotiating with Freeburg’s crime bosses. Sometimes you’ll find yourself dodging questions in the press room, or even the occasional cross-examination in the witness box. Can you keep this pressure cooker from exploding, at least for long enough to stash away a nice retirement nest egg?

- Your mission is clear: make $500,000 in 180 days before Jack Boyd reaches retirement. How? That’s up to you!

- Decisions, decisions! This Is the Police is all about a dark story and how you react to it. Whatever you decide, your choices will influence the game – and the fate of Jack Boyd.

- The Good, the Bad, and... the Ugly? The Chief of Freeburg's Police Department deals with all kind of people. It is up to you to find the bad guys and decide how to deal with them.

- Carry out your duties. As head of Freeburg PD, Jack deals with all sorts of challenges every day: responding to emergencies, managing his officers, defending the department against City Hall and a corrupt mayor, and much more.

- Solve Investigations and gather evidence against the criminal gangs of Freeburg.

- Deal with the competing powers of the city. Everyone offers you favors, and each one comes at a price.
Rich and fully voiced story: Jack Boyd is portrayed by Jon St. John, the voice of Duke Nukem.

Place any document in front of your device’s camera: our scanner app automatically recognizes the paper against the background, crops it, and cleans up the result. You obtain a crisp, legible scan. Batch scanning lets you scan dozens of pages in a matter of seconds. Powerful tools help you organize, share, or archive your documents.

“Next time you plan to hit the road, don’t forget to download Genius Scan to make life easier for yourself and your accounting department.” - AppPicker.com

“Camera apps aren’t designed for close-up text scanning, but Genius Scan is.” - The Guardian

== ENTERPRISE EDITION ==

Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan:

Managed Configuration:

- Pre-configuration of app settings on a per-user basis (eg. set default email address, WebDAV/FTP credentials)

- No ads

== KEY FEATURES == 

Smart Scanning:

- Document detection & background removal
- Distortion correction

- Multiple page PDF creation

Export:

OCR (Text Recognition):

+ Searchable PDF creation

== ABOUT US ==

It’s in the heart of Paris, France that The Grizzly Labs develops Genius Scan. pt.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

Posicione qualquer documento em frente à câmera do seu dispositivo: nosso aplicativo digitalizador reconhecerá o papel contra o fundo, cortará sua imagem e limpará o resultado. Você obterá uma digitalização nítida e legível. A digitalização em lote permite que você digitalize dezenas de páginas em apenas alguns segundos. Ferramentas poderosas ajudam a organizar, compartilhar ou arquivar seus documentos.

"Na próxima vez que você planejar viajar, não se esqueça de baixar uma cópia do Genius Scan para facilitar sua vida e a do departamento de contabilidade." - AppPicker.com

"Os aplicativos de câmera não foram projetados para digitalizar textos de perto, mas o Genius Scan sim." - The Guardian

== ENTERPRISE EDITION ==

Pacote Genius Scan+ Premium:

- Todos os recursos premium do Genius Scan+ (indicados com + abaixo), prontos para usar (sem necessidade de atualização).

Configuração gerenciada:

- Implantação em frotas de dispositivos por uma ferramenta MDM
- Definição prévia das configurações do aplicativo por usuário (por exemplo, definir endereço de email padrão, credenciais de WebDAV/FTP)
- Controle de quais aplicativos e serviços para os quais os usuários podem exportar documentos
- Sem anúncios

== PRINCIPAIS RECURSOS == 

Digitalização inteligente:

- Detecção de documento e remoção de fundo
- Correção de distorções
- Remoção de sombras e limpeza de imperfeição
- Filtros (preto e branco, quadro branco, foto)
- Digitalização em lote

Criação e edição de PDF:

- Mescla e divisão de documentos
- Criação de PDF multipáginas
- Importação de fotos e PDF

Segurança e privacidade:

- Processamento de documentos no dispositivo
+ Face ID
+ Criptografia de senha no PDF

Organização de documentos:

- Identificação de documentos
- Pesquisa de metadados e conteúdo
+ Esquemas personalizados de nomenclatura (Smart Document Names)
+ Backup e sincronização multidispositivos da Genius Cloud (assinatura em separado)

Exporta:

- Email
+ Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV.
+ Qualquer serviço compatível com WebDAV, como Citrix ShareFile, NextCloud, ownCloud, Synology, Yandex. 
+ Exportação automática de fundo

OCR (Reconhecimento de texto):

+ Extração de texto
+ Criação de PDFs pesquisáveis
+ Leitura de cartões de visita e criação de contatos

== QUEM SOMOS ==

É no coração de Paris, na França, que The Grizzly Labs desenvolve o Genius Scan. Nos orgulhamos por criarmos aplicativos que ajudam milhões de usuários em todo o mundo, e que nos colocam nos mais altos padrões de qualidade e privacidade. Entre em contato conosco @thegrizzlylabs se tiver alguma dúvida.

== PREÇOS E LEGAIS ==

Você pode se inscrever no Genius Cloud para backup e sincronização. Nesse caso, a loja da Genius Scan exibe a duração e o preço de cada assinatura, atualizados no momento da compra. O pagamento será cobrado na conta do iTunes quando o pedido for confirmado. As assinaturas são renovadas automaticamente, a menos que a renovação automática seja desativada até 24 horas antes do final do período atual. Gerenciar assinaturas, desative a renovação automática nas configurações da conta do iTunes.

pt.description:
FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control.

For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai.

Why FlowDown

Lightweight and efficient  
Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines.

Rich formatting with Markdown  
Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use.

Works with the tools you already have  
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it.

Talk with text, images, and audio  
Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to:
- Transcribe meetings or lectures
- Summarize voice notes
- Ask about the content inside a photo

Smooth, instant-feeling conversations  
Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish.

Automatic chat titles  
Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later.

Shortcut integrations  
Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can:
- Send selected text from another app to your model
- Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap
- Build custom automations that call your favourite model

Privacy by design  
Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved.

Open source and transparent  
Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works.

Free trial and open code

FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying.

Source code and trial builds are available at:  
https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown  
To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version.

Local models

For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory.

Supported model families include:  
Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4.

This gives you:
- Full control over your data
- No dependency on external servers
- The ability to experiment with different open models

Remote models

A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee.

For consistent, reliable use, we recommend:
- Bringing your own API, or
- Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware

FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy.

Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it.

We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website.

Important note

AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output.

© 2025 FlowDown Team. All rights reserved.

pt.description:
Northgard é um jogo de estratégia baseado na mitologia nórdica em que você controla um clã de vikings que lutam pelo controle de um misterioso continente recém-descoberto.

Após anos de explorações incansáveis, os bravos vikings descobriram uma nova terra cheia de mistérios, perigos e riquezas: NORTHGARD.

Os nórdicos mais ousados embarcaram para explorar e conquistar essas novas costas, trazer fama para seu clã e escrever a história por meio de conquistas, comércio ou devoção aos deuses.

Isto é, se eles conseguirem sobreviver aos terríveis lobos e guerreiros mortos-vivos que vagam pela terra, fazer amizade ou derrotar os gigantes e sobreviver aos invernos mais rigorosos já testemunhados no norte.

RECURSOS
• Monte seu povoado no continente recém-descoberto de Northgard
• Atribua vários empregos a seus vikings (fazendeiro, guerreiro, marinheiro, mestre historiador...)
• Gerencie os recursos com cuidado e sobreviva a invernos rigorosos e inimigos cruéis
• Expanda e descubra novos territórios com oportunidades estratégicas únicas
• Alcance condições de vitória diferentes (conquista, fama, conhecimento, negociação...)

MODO DE HISTÓRIA: SAGA DE RIG
O Alto Rei Viking é assassinado e seu chifre real é roubado por um homem chamado Hagen.
Este evento dá início a uma saga que levará Rig, seu filho e herdeiro, acompanhado pelo braço direito Brand através do novo continente de Northgard.
O continente onde ele fará novos amigos e inimigos e descobrirá uma ameaça muito maior do que Hagen, além das razões por trás do assassinato do pai.

MULTIJOGADOR
• Jogue com ou contra outros jogadores em dispositivos móveis. Até 6 jogadores
• Inclui os modos de duelo, por conta própria e em equipe

ESCOLHA O SEU CLÃ
Para concluir os 11 capítulos da campanha, o jogador terá que dominar as especificidades dos 6 primeiros clãs e domar a selvagem e implacável Northgard.

Mais clãs estão se juntando à luta por Northgard!
• Clã da Cobra: aja das sombras e assuma a liderança com táticas de guerrilha astutas
• Clã do Dragão: abrace os velhos costumes e agrade aos deuses com sacrifícios
• Clã do Kraken: aproveite a recompensa do mar e liberte seu poder brutal
Você pode desbloquear os clãs da Cobra, do Dragão e do Kraken separadamente comprando os DLCs ou juntos com o Pacote de Pele.

• Clã do Cavalo: dedique-se à arte de ferreiro e crie relíquias poderosas
• Clã do Boi: use equipamentos ancestrais e comprove o poder dos seus antepassados
• Clã do Lince: adote o caminho da natureza e atraia presas míticas em emboscadas
Você pode desbloquear os clãs do Cavalo, do Boi e do Lince separadamente comprando os DLCs, ou juntos com o Pacote de Pelo.

• Clã do Esquilo: junte ingredientes, prepare receitas especiais e sobreviva aos invernos rigorosos
• Clã do Rato: abrace o caminho dos xamãs e trabalhe para o clã
• Clã da Águia: ocupe um grande território, aventure-se por aí e junte recursos
Desbloqueie os clãs do Esquilo, do Rato e da Águia separadamente comprando os DLCs, ou juntos com o Pacote de Inverno.

Reprojetado cuidadosamente para dispositivos móveis
• Interface renovada
• Conquistas do Game Center
• iCloud - Compartilhe o progresso entre dispositivos iOS

Como você honrará seu clã?

Se você tiver qualquer problema com Northgard, entre em contato com nosso atendimento ao cliente em support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com e forneça o máximo de informações possível sobre o problema.

pt.description:
Semeia colheitas, cria um império agrícola! Torna-te um agricultor moderno e opera mais de 100 máquinas genuínas da Case IH, CLAAS, DEUTZ-FAHR, Fendt, John Deere, KRONE, Massey Ferguson, New Holland, Valtra e outros fabricantes prestigiados de todo o mundo, que oferecem uma vasta gama de atividades agrícolas. 

Decide que tipo de agricultor queres ser no Farming Simulator 23 (FS23) já que o famoso simulador da GIANTS Software oferece uma experiência nova em folha com várias funcionalidades inéditas para o teu dispositivo móvel!

Opera tratores, ceifeiras, pulverizadores e outras máquinas realistas
Semeia os campos com várias colheitas ou cultiva uvas e azeitonas nas encostas
Corta árvores com equipamento de silvicultura 
Estabelece cadeias de produção e usa camiões potentes para o transporte
Cuida animais como vacas, ovelhas e agora: galinhas!
Aproveita as possibilidades de dois mapas novos com objetos colecionáveis
A nova jogabilidade inclui a aradura e a monda
Um modo tutorial, um trabalhador IA e uma nova função de carga automática para troncos/paletes vão ajudar-te na quinta 

Depois de arar, extirpar, ceifar ou recolher ovos dos galinheiros, há muito mais a fazer: Produz mercadorias valiosas a partir das tuas colheitas para expandir o teu negócio em desenvolvimento com novas fábricas e cadeias de produção! 

Não te preocupes! Há sempre tempo para relaxar e passear pelos vastos terrenos aráveis enquanto a paisagem muda com as estações do ano. Se mais de 100 máquinas não chegam, aumenta a tua frota de veículos agrícolas através de conteúdo extra oficial.

Os novos tutoriais no jogo mostram-te os cantos à quinta se a vida no campo for uma novidade para ti. Começa a exploração agrícola onde quer que vás e diverte-te!

pt.description:
Aproveite a primeira entrada da série móvel Way of the Hunter, ambientada no belo noroeste do Pacífico norte-americano.

Esta experiência de caça autêntica deixa você caçar e explorar ambientes abertos enormes nos Nez Perce Valleys dos Estados Unidos. Encontre animais realistas em belos habitats naturais e utilize diversas réplicas detalhadas de armas.

Way of the Hunter oferece uma experiência altamente imersiva e integrada, com vida selvagem deslumbrante e comportamento realista dos grupos de animais. Testemunhe as transformações em ecossistemas complexos, que reagem e se adaptam ao que você fizer. Aprenda a caçar de verdade e ponha suas habilidades à prova.

Enfrente os desafios da caça ética com uma história cativante, ou simplesmente divirta-se caçando em ambientes deslumbrantes.

* Dezenas de espécies incrivelmente detalhadas com comportamentos realistas para proporcionar uma experiência de caça verdadeiramente imersiva.
* Cace como um profissional com recursos que destacam sinais de animais e analisam respingos de sangue. Analise a trajetória dos seus disparos com a câmera rebobinável.
* Use seu sentido de caçador para destacar detalhes e informações importantes, ou desative-o.
* O complexo sistema de troféus gera chifres exclusivos com base em vários fatores, como estado físico e idade das caças.
* Animações e reações de animais naturais e sofisticadas ao sentir a presença dos jogadores.
* Ciclos de dia e noite com 24 horas, além de vento e clima variáveis.
* Simulação realística de balística e de física de projéteis.
* Grande seleção de armas de fogo e equipamentos, incluindo itens licenciados das empresas Bushnell, Federal, Leupold, Primos, Remington e Steyr Arms.
* A economia do jogo permite a você caçar e vender a carne para comprar mais equipamentos, licenças de caça e serviços de taxidermia para seus troféus.
* Uma história cativante sobre os obstáculos enfrentados por uma empresa familiar de caça e a rivalidade e amizades que a cercam.
* Modo de fotografia intuitivo, para capturar e compartilhar seus momentos favoritos.
* Rastreie a sua presa usando ou o gamepad ou os controles de toque
* Controle otimizado e eficiente para dispositivos móveis

Necessita de um dispositivo com pelo menos 6 GB de RAM para utilizar as definições gráficas mais elevadas.

pt.description:
Vocês já está cansado das mesas velhas histórias? Você está interessado em jogos narrativos, romances gráficos, jogos baseados em chat e jogos indie, mas você está cansado da mesma coisa? Se sim, você deveria checar '7Days', um jogo de mistério com romance gráfico e baseado em decisões. 

'7Days' é um jogo narrativo de mistério com romance gráfico. É um jogo narrativo único baseado em decisões onde o usuário pode criar suas histórias baseadas na escolha que ele fizer.

Nós fornecemos a melhor experiência de um jogo narrativo com um enredo de mistério em estilo bate papo, projetado para dispositivos móveis. É um jogo altamente recomendado para você.

■ Jogo explicado
Toda escolha muda a sua história.
Cada pequena escolha irá mudar seu relacionamento com seus companheiros,
e altera seu destino e de seus companheiros nos momentos críticos.

Você pode ser o vilão ou um companheiro de confiança.
Tudo depende de suas escolhas.

■ Resumo
Existem espíritos que foram colocados ao testa para ressurreição no mundo da morte.
O mensageiro da morte os atribuiu com a tarefa de se atacarem ou trabalharem juntos. Seu personagem, Kirell, deve completar tambés as tarefas baseadas em escolhas que lhe foram atribuídas.
Mas suas tarefas necessitam que outros morram...

Você só tem 7 dias
O que você irá escolher?

Experimente está história que provoca a imaginação agora mesmo.

■ Características do jogo
- Estilo quadrinho com gráficos incríveis
- Enredo único que alterna entre a vida e a morte
- O enredo muda de acordo com suas escolhas
- Várias conquistas e desafios ocultos
- Episódios e finais diferentes baseados na história
- Aventura de texto com uma sensação misteriosa
- Enredo excitante

■ Recomendado para aqueles que:
- Estão interessados em conteúdo/texto interativo como romances gráficos, jogos narrativos, jogos de bate papo e jogos sociais
- São apaixonados por jogos indie como 'Undertale'
- Estão procurando por uma jogo narrativo com elementos de mistério e/ou terror
- Estão procurando por O jogo e estão cansados dos jogos narrativos de sempre
- Estão interessados em diferentes tipos de jogos de aventura
Nós também recomendamos 'Underworld Office: Ghost Game', outro de nossos grandes jogos.

■ Nós garantimos a diversão. Baixe e experimente agora

Se você encontrar algum problema ou tem alguma sugestão, por favor, envie para nós em help@buffstudio.com. Nós trabalhamos duro para fazer os melhores jogos de aventura, narrativos, indie, restauradores e romances gráficos.

■ Nós precisamos da sua ajuda para fazer jogos narrativos melhores. Por favor, recomende este jogo narrativo para sua família e amigos. Será de grande ajuda para nós.

About:
Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms.

To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. Sometimes a player would need to put the old solution aside and take on a new perspective towards the problem, reexamine and rethink before making a move.

Features:
● Dungeon + Puzzle + Sokoban
● 150 handcrafted rooms
● Fantasy themed pixel art
● Non-linear dungeon map

pt.description:
"Mergulhe numa história intensa de corrupção, crimes e intrigas. Encarne o rígido Chefe de Polícia Jack Boyd e fique cara a cara com a escória de Freeburg, uma cidade em queda livre. Será que Jack vai chegar à aposentadoria com uma bolada, esperando para ser gasta, ou vai acabar durango… ou pior ainda?

Seja tragado por este polêmico conto de corrupção, crime e intriga policial. Gerencie sua equipe, atende às emergências e investigue os crimes numa cidade à beira do caos. O submundo da máfia trama por trás dos panos, fincando suas garras cada vez mais fundo na cidade, mesmo o prefeito estando pronto para explorar cada situação para levar vantagem política.

Escolha sua abordagem a cada situação à medida que ela se desenrola. Você às vezes vai reagir a uma crise se desdobrando numa cena de crime, ou negociar com os chefões do crime de Freeburg. Outras vezes, você vai se deparar se esquivando de perguntas feitas numa coletiva de imprensa, ou até mesmo num eventual interrogatório no rol de testemunhas. Será que você consegue evitar que este vulcão entre em erupção, pelo menos até conseguir um bom pé de meia para a aposentadoria? Ou será que você vai acabar atrás das grades — ou pior?"

- Sua missão é simples: Conseguir $ 500.000 em 180 dias, antes de Jack Boyd se aposentar. Como? Aí é com você!

- Decisões, decisões e mais decisões: em miúdos, “This Is the Police” é uma história sombria e como você reage a ela. Qualquer que seja a sua decisão, ela influenciará o jogo — e, portanto, o destino de Jack Boyd.

- O bem, o mal… a escória? O Chefe do Departamento de Polícia de Freeburg lida com todos os tipos de pessoas. Vai de você separar os bons dos maus.

- Cumpra com suas obrigações: Como chefe do DP de Freeburg, Jack deve cuidar das atividades cotidianas: atender às emergências, gerenciar seus policiais, brigar pelo orçamento…

- Comece resolvendo as Investigações e consiga evidências contra as gangues criminosas de Freeburg.

- Negocie com os diferentes poderes da cidade: o prefeito, a máfia, a igreja, o sindicato dos trabalhadores. Todos oferecem favores, mas tudo tem seu preço.

- Dublagem feita totalmente pelo glorioso Jon St. John (vulgo: a voz do Duke Nukem).
